{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211345280683D79972E775C3E63E"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616068299118134078","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"义父们，有空的可以进来看两眼，拜谢[送心][送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773268121,"group_id":"7588517817092148249","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"番茄爸爸什么时候给我首秀啊qwq","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6oyhxzVo32rERAQ0sTVmR0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a78fedf0795f4f3189c5e9593e16fe36~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620299&x-signature=pCg1F7rozp5h5UJlNuKzUBzya1A%3D","user_id":"52152497035","user_name":"钱悦君"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"52152497035","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_3","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.3","title_id":"author_level_3"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.3","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.3"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588517817092148249","book_info":{"abstract":"（玄幻脑洞）＋（天命掠夺系统）＋（女帝）＋（傻子公主）＋（皇子作为质子入赘到敌国）
“皇儿啊，爹对不起你，爹打不过大梁女帝，你只能作为质子入赘到大梁……”
一觉醒来，江逸不敢相信，老爹就这么把自己卖了，他堂堂大楚皇子居然要入赘到大梁。
然而，不是入赘公主吗?怎么和我入洞房的是女帝？
……
我叫苏凰月，重生归来，使用秘法两年半直升准帝，逼死皇兄，成为大梁女帝，引领大梁走上鼎盛；但是没想到的是，秘法的副作用来的太快，只有依靠神魔体才能缓解；而全天下唯一拥有神魔体的只有大楚六皇子江逸……
我叫苏云萱，姑姑逼死父皇，囚禁皇兄，而我依靠装傻逃过一劫甚至姑姑对我极为愧疚，但我却恨极了姑姑，我人生的后几年一直处于痛苦之中，直到遇到了自己的夫君，他乐观向上，对我和皇兄父亲一样。
可是就当自己打算把一切都交给他的时候，我居然发现他和姑姑……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o14b88038e7ee89769369a05238c6a8b6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"钱悦君","author_id":"","book_id":"7588517817092148249","book_name":"战败入赘公主，女帝仙国是嫁妆？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2231人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7591995196863169048","read_count":"2231","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"113127"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"51","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,东方玄幻,系统,女帝,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o14b88038e7ee89769369a05238c6a8b6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255928&x-signature=3Yfvo7lIbeWyJPJtUYkONiVLNxc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52152497035","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211345280683D79972E775C3E63E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded
